variant.role: Different captured trait amplified — photography + voice
variant.bet: The warm clinician-with-patient photography runs at full editorial scale; reassurance voice given room; quieter type, magazine whitespace.
variant.amplifies: Photography re-foregrounding (what-if #2) + voice-register (#5), in service of Design Principles 1 (reassurance) and 3 (warm not sterile).
variant.differentiatingToken: type-scale ratio 1.2, heading weight 500, body line-height 1.7; full-bleed editorial image block; 32px card padding
variant.motion: static — no parallax/Ken-Burns; imagery carries warmth at rest; NO motion register

hirslanden-blue.note: rarer here — imagery does the emotional work

headline.purpose: Editorial lead-ins at weight 500 — never a shout.

shadows.name: card-lift
shadows.purpose: Caption panels and content cards only; full-bleed images stay flat.

header.purpose: Wordmark + nav + search + utility bar; reachable emergency path.

footer.purpose: Group blurb, social, link mega-menu, prominent emergency 144.

editorial-image-block.purpose: Page-lead pattern: captured photograph at full-bleed / edge-to-edge with quiet lead-in and caption.
editorial-image-block.siteWideConstraint: Images reused at captured semantic position; untreated; never thumbnail-cropped.

motifs.warmPhotography: AMPLIFIED — clinician-with-patient imagery at full editorial scale, untreated, reused at captured semantic positions

voice.register: formal Swiss-German Sie; reassurance-forward — GIVEN EDITORIAL ROOM as lead-ins and captions
dos: Do let the reassurance line read as editorial copy, not a watermark.
Do caption photography warmly and specifically.
Do keep lead-ins unhurried; one idea per editorial block.
donts: Don't reduce voice to UI microcopy.
Don't let type out-shout the image.

iaPriorities.evidence: voice.heroImage hirslanden-her-onkologie 2900x1419 + warm human content imagery, currently cropped to teaser thumbnails
warm grounds + warm text + human photography — the central bet of this variant

divergence.densityNote: sectionPadding desktop held at 64px — the multi-audience hard floor ceiling (>5 sections / >2 audience tracks). 'Generous magazine whitespace' is achieved via large media, wide gutters, and long line-height (1.7), NOT via >64px padding. Floor respected.
brand_faithful_inversions: #ffffff retained as caption-panel / card ground (brand decision). 'No pure white' inverted per brand-faithful direction.
Hex token format retained. OKLCH applies to new authoring only.
Sharp 0px corners retained on cards/inputs/primary buttons. 'Modern means rounded' reflex inverted.
Saturated #0094d4 retained as primary action color. Tinted-neutral-primary reflex inverted.
#f43a11 retained as reserved color for the 144 affordance only. Spread-accent reflex inverted.
Captured photography reused untreated at semantic position — the agent-default 'add a duotone/overlay treatment' reflex is inverted; warmth is the captured image's own.
divergence.antiToolboxAudit: editorial-register vocabulary check: brand register is direct-services healthcare, not a publication — 'editorial' here means photography-led layout, NOT atelier/journal/studio voice. No editorial-vocabulary slop introduced. Passes.
divergence.motionRegister: none — static variant; explicitly no Ken-Burns/parallax on the imagery

components.name: Editorial Image Block
components.description: Full-bleed captured photograph with a quiet warm-ground caption panel.
components.css: .ds-editorial { margin: 0; } .ds-editorial-img { display: block; width: 100%; height: auto; object-fit: cover; } .ds-editorial-cap { background: #f7f6f5; padding: 32px; font-family: Metropolis, sans-serif; color: #534c46; } .ds-eyebrow { font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; color: #72665b; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-editorial-lead { font-weight: 700; font-size: clamp(2rem, 3.5vw, 2.5rem); line-height: 1.2; margin: 8px 0 12px; } .ds-editorial-cap p { font-weight: 400; font-size: 1.0625rem; line-height: 1.7; margin: 0; }

components.name: Quiet Section Lead-in
components.html: Die Hirslanden-Gruppe ist in der ganzen Schweiz zu Hause.
components.css: .ds-leadin { font-family: Metropolis, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 1.5rem; line-height: 1.3; color: #534c46; max-width: 28ch; }

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #0094d4; color: #fff; padding: 12px 28px; border: none; border-radius: 0; font-family: Metropolis, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; transition: background 0.18s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0083bd; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0094d4; outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview: Variant C amplifies the captured photography — clinician-with-patient imagery run at full editorial scale instead of thumbnail teasers — and gives the reassurance voice editorial room. Type goes quieter (ratio 1.2, weight 500, line-height 1.7) so the imagery leads.
keyCharacteristics: Full-bleed editorial photography, untreated, at captured position
Quieter type: ratio 1.2, heading weight 500, body 1.7
Generous magazine whitespace within the density floor
Reassurance voice as editorial lead-ins and captions

rules.name: The Photography-Leads Rule
rules.body: On image-led sections the photograph is the largest element; type and color are quiet partners.

rules.name: The Quiet-Type Rule
rules.body: Headings prefer weight 500; weight 700 is reserved for the single hero line.

rules.name: The Image-Is-Flat Rule
rules.body: Editorial photography is never shadowed or framed.

dos: Do run captured photography at full editorial scale at its captured position.
Do keep type quiet so imagery leads.
Do give the reassurance voice editorial room.
donts: Don't crop strong photography back to thumbnails.
Don't apply filters/duotone/overlays to brand photography.
Don't add Ken-Burns, parallax, or any cinematic motion register.
